heading:
Guro
Alvin Penaflor
narrative: Practiced and dabbled in other forms of martial arts from an early age before finding Lapunti. From Karate, Judo, Aikido, Tai Chi, Jeet Kune Do, Krav Maga to lesser known arts like Zeta Zen Aikido and Wonwhado.
Co-founded Lapunti Arnis De Abanico UP Diliman Training Group in 2010. Now known as Lapunti Karilyon.

credentials.promotedBy: Promoted and certified by the late Supreme Grandmaster, SGM Undo Caburnay, in 2015.

lineage.title: Main developer & originator of the Caburnay family art. A 'panday' or blacksmith by trade who went around the Visayas and Mindanao to ply his trade and learn from different masters of the area.
Grand Master. Established the early Escrima de Abanico group, later became the Lapunti Arnis De Abanico school or style
Supreme Grandmaster of Lapunti Arnis De Abanico
Grandmaster. Direct student of GM Felimon and SGM Undo Caburnay. Brought the art of Lapunti Arnis De Abanico to Luzon.
Senior Masters. First cousins and students of GM Cris Ampit from an early age. The most senior practitioners of Lapunti in Luzon.
Lakan Apat or Guro (teacher/instructor). Direct student of both SM Buboy Ador and SM Nonoy Doncillo.

timeline.event: Began training in Lapunti Arnis De Abanico; co-founded the UP Diliman training group
Group officially recognized as a Lapunti chapter by SGM Undo Caburnay and LADAI Headquarters
Promoted to Guro (Lakan Apat) by SGM Undo Caburnay during the annual club seminar and promotions
Active instructor at Lapunti Karilyon, University of the Philippines, Diliman campus and teaching a few private students on spare time.
